name: github-copilot-toolbox
description: GitHub Copilot Toolbox: MCP hub, workspace helpers, Thinking Machine Mode (context packs & priming), readiness, One Click dual migration (Cursor + Claude Code → Copilot), and bundled bridges. Not affiliated with Microsoft or GitHub. See README Disclaimer. Workflow ideas credited in NOTICE (everything-claude-code, MIT).
author: amitchorasiya

copilot-toolbox.npxTag.description: npm dist-tag or version appended after @ for npx packages (e.g. latest or 1.0.1).

copilot-toolbox.embeddedBridgeNodeExecut.description: Absolute path to the Node.js binary for hub “Without npx” bundled CLIs. Leave empty to run the command `node` from the integrated terminal PATH (same expectation as npx). Do not point at VS Code itself — `node` must be a real Node install.

copilot-toolbox.useInsidersPaths.description: Resolve user mcp.json under VS Code Insiders instead of stable.

copilot-toolbox.intelligence.includeGitB.description: Pre-select “Include git” in the context pack quick pick (still confirm each run).

copilot-toolbox.intelligence.includeDiag.description: Pre-select “Include diagnostics” in the context pack quick pick.

copilot-toolbox.intelligence.appendNotep.description: Pre-select “Append to session notepad” after building a context pack.

copilot-toolbox.intelligence.openChatAft.description: Pre-select “Open Copilot Chat” after building a context pack.

copilot-toolbox.translateWrapMultilineIn.description: When translating selection, wrap multiline result in a markdown code fence (language = active editor).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.settingsSc.description: Where One Click writes settings it updates (e.g. enabling auto-scan). User = global; workspace = folder .vscode/settings.json.
enumDescriptions: Write to the open workspace folder’s .vscode/settings.json when possible.
Write to your User settings (applies to all folders).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runCursorT.description: One Click: run the **Cursor → GitHub Copilot** steps (`.cursor/skills` migrate, Cursor rules CLI, `.cursorrules` merge, Cursor MCP port). Turn off if you only use Claude Code.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runClaudeC.description: One Click: run the **Claude Code → GitHub Copilot** steps (`CLAUDE.md` merge, `.claude/skills` migrate, project `.mcp.json` port). Turn off if you only use Cursor.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMemory.description: Memory bank init (github-copilot-memory-bank): one mode per run. **Default: apply** (init without --force; keeps existing SKILL templates unless you choose applyForce).
enumDescriptions: Default — run init without --force (same as interactive “No” when templates already exist).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMemory.description: When memory bank init runs, add --cursor-rules to the CLI. **Default: on** (pairs with rules → Copilot and .cursorrules merge when you use One Click). Only applied when the Cursor migration track is on.

Reserved for when **github-copilot-memory-bank** adds a CLAUDE.md ingest flag. Until then, One Click merges **CLAUDE.md** into **copilot-instructions.md** via the Claude Code track; memory bank init stays unchanged.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.syncCursor.description: Cursor rules → Copilot (cursor-rules-to-github-copilot): one mode per run. **Default: apply**.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.appendCurs.description: If .cursorrules exists, merge into .github/copilot-instructions.md (replaceable block). **Default: on** for One Click.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrateSki.description: Migrate .cursor/skills → .agents/skills: pick one target (single-select). Copy/move is set below.
enumDescriptions: Do not migrate skills during One Click.
Migrate under the open workspace folder only.
Migrate under your user home only.
Run migration for both workspace and user roots.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrateSki.description: How to migrate when the target above is not “off”.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.mergeClaud.description: Merge repo-root **CLAUDE.md** into `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (replaceable block). **CLAUDE.local.md** is controlled separately.
enumDescriptions: Write or update the merged block (default).
Preview only — no file write; a note appears in the One Click summary.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.mergeClaud.description: When merging CLAUDE.md, also append **CLAUDE.local.md** if it exists (default **off** for privacy).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrateCla.description: Migrate **.claude/skills** → **.agents/skills** (SKILL.md folders). Colliding names in `.agents/skills` are skipped.
enumDescriptions: Do not migrate Claude skills during One Click.
Migrate under the open workspace folder only (default).
Migrate under your user home only.
Run migration for both workspace and user roots.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrateCla.description: How to migrate Claude skills when the target above is not “off”.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.portClaude.description: Port **workspace `.mcp.json`** (`mcpServers` or `servers`) into VS Code **mcp.json**. No-op if the file is missing or invalid. **Dry** logs to Output → GitHub Copilot Toolbox.
enumDescriptions: Replace workspace .vscode/mcp.json `servers` with entries from .mcp.json only.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.portCursor.description: Port Cursor MCP → Copilot: pick one target (One Click and default for Settings). Single-select in Settings.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.instructio.description: After bridges, how to treat MCP & Skills background auto-scan and merging MCP/skills into .github/copilot-instructions.md. Pick one (single-select).
enumDescriptions: Turn on auto-scan (using settings scope above) so future opens/scans merge the MCP/skills block.
Do not enable auto-scan; still merge once during the awareness step in this run.
Do not enable auto-scan from One Click and do not force a one-time merge (merge only if auto-scan was already on).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runAwarene.description: After bridges, run MCP & Skills scan (writes `.github/copilot-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md` and updates `copilot-instructions.md`). Turning on auto-scan from One Click is separate (instructionMergeAfterOneClick).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runConfigS.description: Run Copilot/MCP config scan to Output.

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.enableClau.description: During One Click: set User setting github.copilot.chat.claudeAgent.enabled to true so Copilot Chat can offer Claude as a cloud partner agent. Still requires eligible Copilot plan, org enablement of Claude under Partner Agents, and GitHub account settings for third-party agents where applicable. Use Intelligence hub → Claude agent prerequisites for details.

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.enab.title: Thinking Machine Mode
copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.enab.description: Master switch for Thinking Machine priming (hub + Command Palette). When you turn this on, confirm **Engage** in the dialog (Cancel turns it off). The hub has the same toggle under One Click Setup.

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.runA.description: During Thinking Machine priming: run MCP & Skills awareness (writes `.github/copilot-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md`).

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.merg.description: During Thinking Machine priming: merge the MCP/skills block into `.github/copilot-instructions.md` when running the awareness scan (same rules as interactive scan + auto-scan).

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.show.description: Show a confirmation before Thinking Machine priming writes under `.github/` or copies the context pack.

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.useS.description: When off, Thinking Machine priming uses the GitHub Copilot Toolbox context pack defaults. When on, use the four overrides in this section instead.

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.incl.description: Thinking Machine priming only: include git section in the context pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).
Thinking Machine priming only: include diagnostics in the context pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.appe.description: Thinking Machine priming only: append context pack to session notepad (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).

copilot-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode.open.description: Thinking Machine priming only: open Copilot Chat after copying the pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).

copilot-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMemory.description: Deprecated pre-0.5.15. Replaced by initMemoryBankMode. Removed automatically on activation if still present.

copilot-toolbox.intelligence.autoScanMcp.description: When checked: after a workspace opens (debounced), save MCP & Skills awareness to `.github/copilot-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md` (overwritten), refresh hub, and update the MCP/skills block in `.github/copilot-instructions.md` — no editor tab. Re-runs on reopen so new MCP/skills are reflected. **Scan now** on the hub does the same immediately and always refreshes `copilot-instructions.md`. Use Copilot Chat in **Agent** mode with MCP trusted/started for live tools (e.g. Confluence → Confluence MCP).
